items.title: Asos co-founder dies after Thailand apartment block fall
items.dek: Quentin Griffiths co-founded Asos in 2000 and remained a significant shareholder after leaving the firm five years later.
items.body: Quentin Griffiths co-founded Asos in 2000 and remained a significant shareholder after leaving the firm five years later.

items.title: Naked man steals ambulance in Wisconsin, leading police on chase
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mother and infant burnt to death in Indian state over witchcraft allegations
items.dek: Eyewitnesses say a mob stormed the woman's home after rumours spread that she was practising witchcraft.
items.body: Eyewitnesses say a mob stormed the woman's home after rumours spread that she was practising witchcraft.
